name: Below-Threshold 'Zero Report' Filing
description: The 'National Freight Logistics - Site 42' facility previously reported legacy battery chemicals. They have switched to lithium-ion forklifts and no longer store reportable quantities of any hazardous chemicals. Open the facility's baseline submission from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\legacy_warehouse_2024.t2s using EPA Tier2 Submit. Delete all existing chemical records (Sulfuric Acid and Lead). On the main facility screen, check the box for 'No chemicals meet or exceed reporting thresholds'. In the Submission/Facility Notes field, enter exactly: 'Switched to lithium-ion forklifts. No chemicals exceed reporting thresholds.' Save and export the updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\zero_report_submission.t2s.

metadata.expected_note: Switched to lithium-ion forklifts. No chemicals exceed reporting thresholds.
